this diagram models a system for managing events, users, cities, and points of interest (pois).
users can be associated with cities.
pois are also associated with cities and provinces.
the diagram defines the basic attributes and operations for each class.
avvio app -> utente registrato con successo al servizio? — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="if the user is registered successfully";
avvio app -> creazione di un nuovo utente — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="if the user is not registered";
utente registrato con successo al servizio? (si) -> homepage — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="if the user is registered successfully, go to homepage";
utente loggato correttamente? — type=decision
utente loggato correttamente? (si) -> homepage — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="if the user is logged in correctly, go to homepage";
utente loggato correttamente? (no) -> creazione di un nuovo utente — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="if the user is not logged in correctly, create a new user";
the diagram models the login/registration process of an application.
the user can either start the application and be directed to the homepage if already registered and logged in, or create a new user if not.
the flow includes a check for successful registration and correct login.
avvio app -> utente registrato? — type=transition; label="sì"; explanation="if the user is logged in";
avvio app -> i campi sono corretti? — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="if the fields are not correct";
utente registrato? -> svolgi i passaggi per ricercare una città — type=transition; label="sì"; explanation="if the user is logged in";
utente registrato? -> compila i form — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="if the user is not logged in";
svolgi i passaggi per ricercare una città -> scorrgi l basso e premi "+" per aggiungere un evento — type=transition; label="sì"; explanation="if the user is searching for a city";
svolgi i passaggi per ricercare una città -> i campi sono corretti? — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="if the fields are not correct";
compila i form -> i campi sono corretti? — type=transition; label="sì"; explanation="if the fields are correct";
compila i form -> evento creato — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="if the fields are not correct";
scorrgi l basso e premi "+" per aggiungere un evento -> evento creato — type=transition; label="sì"; explanation="if the user adds an event";
the process starts with the application launch.
the user must first be logged in.
if the user is logged in, they can either search for a city or start filling out a form.
if the user is not logged in, they must first fill out a form.
the process continues until an event is created, which happens only if the fields are correct.
if the fields are not correct, the user is prompted to correct them, and the process restarts.
avvio app -> utente registrato al servizio? — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="user not logged in"
utente registrato al servizio? -> svolgi i passaggi per ricercare una città — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="user is logged in"
svolgi i passaggi per ricercare una città -> è nella schermata di visualizzazione di una città? — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="not in city view"
è nella schermata di visualizzazione di una città? -> campi sono corretti? — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="fields are not correct"
campi sono corretti? -> compila i form per modificare l'evento — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="fields are correct"
compila i form per modificare l'evento -> scorri in basso e premi "?" per rimuovere un evento o "a" per permettere la modifica — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="no action taken"
scorri in basso e premi "?" per rimuovere un evento o "a" per permettere la modifica -> hai premuto "?"— type=transition; label="no"; explanation="no action taken"
hai premuto "?" -> evento cancellato — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="event not cancelled"
hai premuto "?" -> evento modificato — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="event cancelled"
the process starts with the user launching the application.
the user must first be logged in to proceed.
the user can either cancel or modify the event.
the user needs to check if the fields are correct before modifying the event.
the user can cancel the event by scrolling down and pressing "?".
the user can modify the event by scrolling down and pressing "a".
